svg.title: Local Telegram Control Plane Architecture
svg.desc: Telegram mobile messages flow through Telegram server to a local polling bot on Mac, then into workspace runtime, Codex, task logs, and repository state files.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace
ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

svg.text: Telegram is the mobile entrance. The Mac still owns execution, logs, and repository state.
